{{Infobox madra
| name = Green light
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Green light]] crawled out of the [[Handmaiden]]'s limb like moss spreading over a boulder.}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
